Challenge
Blacksmith Glory Totem

Once in a while, the unit reduces the spell power of 2 random enemy mages by 35% for 4 sec. The unit also applies decay on the armor of these enemies. When the enemy's armor is decayed, that enemy takes 150000 pure damage and has their magic armor reduced by 30% for 4 sec. Also, that enemy takes 250000 magic damage over 4 sec.

Requirements: 90
